headings.text: ABS CNC Drilling Service – Chin High Precision ABS CNC Milled Parts Manufacturer

meta_description: Precision ABS drilling part is one of the most popular engineering plastic which will not be ignored.

sections.heading: CNC Drilling For ABS Plastic
sections.text: CNC Drilling For ABS Plastic ABS (Acrylonitrile Butadiene Styrene) plastic is a kind of versatile thermoplastic plastic of low cost, used for making functional and large parts with good mechanical properties. As ABS provides a balanced combination of chemical resistance, mechanical toughness, wide temperature ranges, as well as easy processing, stable product size and good surface luster, it is ideal for turning, drilling and milling. ABS plastic in CNC drilling is usually by hammering a drill bit into the hole with quickly repeated short movement. The hammering action can be performed from outside the hole or within the hole. After surface treatment of silk-screen printing, anodizing, elec...

sections.heading: Applications
sections.text: Junying is one of the most reliable plastic CNC machining services manufacturers in China, specializes in machining drilling all kinds of different materials plastic parts. As one of the most popular engineering plastic – ABS will not be ignored. We have own advanced CNC drilling, turning, milling and lathe to complete different geometry shapes and dimensions of the ABS parts. And we also have professional technical personnel and skilled employers to meet any unique design requirements of our customers. Drilling ABS to close tolerances can be achieved with Junying advanced techniques. Applications Building and lifting industry, Engineering and engineering design industry, Aerospace industry...
